'''Kir Vantai''' was a [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|Defense Fleet]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Admiral Vantai commanded the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Moonshadow (Imperial II-class)|''Moonshadow'']]. He was one of several officers who participated in the [[Battle of Liinade III]].

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]'' {{1st}}
